toolReadiness.setupCommand: sudo apt-get install -y redis-server && sudo systemctl enable --now redis-server; export REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379

docker run -d --name amarktai-qdrant --restart unless-stopped -p 127.0.0.1:6333:6333 -v /var/www/amarktai/qdrant:/qdrant/storage qdrant/qdrant:latest; add QDRANT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:6333 to the VPS .env or qdrant service config
python3 -m venv /var/www/amarktai/.venv && /var/www/amarktai/.venv/bin/pip install scrapy trafilatura && export AMARKTAI_PYTHON_BIN=/var/www/amarktai/.venv/bin/python
python3 -m venv /var/www/amarktai/.venv && /var/www/amarktai/.venv/bin/pip install scrapy trafilatura && export AMARKTAI_PYTHON_BIN=/var/www/amarktai/.venv/bin/python

toolReadiness.setupCommand: Install Rhubarb Lip Sync for the VPS architecture, then set RHUBARB_PATH=/var/www/amarktai/tools/rhubarb/rhubarb or LIPSYNC_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:<port>
